draft:
Dear Officer:

I am writing this letter to provide my strongest recommendation of Ms. Lana Ivanov as an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of artificial intelligence (AI). Ms. Ivanov is a true pioneer in AI-driven creative content production and technology integration, whose groundbreaking work in AI filmmaking is transforming the entertainment industry.

As background, I am the Redwood Professor of Computer Science at Redwood University and the Bentley Family Co-Director of the Redwood Human-Centered AI Institute (HAI). My research areas include machine learning, deep learning, computer vision, and AI in healthcare. I have published over 180 scientific articles and hold several patents in the field of AI.

In addition to my academic roles, I am the Co-founder and CEO of Global Labs, a spatial intelligence company developing Large Universe Models (LUMs) to understand and interact with the 3D world. Global Labs has raised $230 million in funding from investors such as Old Enterprise Associates, Sequoia Capital, and Fossil Ventures. Our technology is at the forefront of AI innovation, and we are working closely with industry leaders to integrate it into cutting-edge applications.

I am also the Co-Founder and Chairperson of the Board of AI4FUTURE, a nonprofit organization dedicated to educating a diverse group of future AI technologists and leaders. AI4FUTURE runs summer programs and online courses for high school students, focusing on AI fundamentals and ethical considerations. Our mission is to increase diversity and inclusion in the AI field, and we have reached over 15,000 students since our founding in 2017.

Through my roles at Redwood, Global Labs, and AI4FUTURE, I have had the opportunity to work with some of the brightest minds in AI research and development. I have seen firsthand the transformative potential of AI technologies across various domains, from healthcare to entertainment. It is in this context that I have come to know Ms. Ivanov and her remarkable work in AI-driven creative content production.

I have had the pleasure of working closely with Ms. Ivanov and her team at Mars, an AI-native entertainment studio and tech lab that she co-founded and currently leads as CEO. Mars is at the forefront of pioneering storytelling in the age of AI, and Ms. Ivanov's vision and leadership have been instrumental in the company's success.

Under her guidance, Mars has developed a proprietary AI production process that integrates cutting-edge technologies, including Global Labs' spatial intelligence solutions. Our collaboration has focused on leveraging Global Labs' Large Universe Models (LUMs) to achieve scene and lighting consistency in AI-generated content. This integration has brought a new level of predictability and scalability to AI filmmaking, moving it beyond randomness and into a realm of structured creativity.

Ms. Ivanov's deep technical expertise and creative acumen have been evident throughout our partnership. She has been a driving force in developing novel methods for character and scene consistency, pushing the boundaries of what is possible in AI-driven content production. Her ability to seamlessly blend technical innovation with artistic vision has set Mars apart as a leader in the industry.

Beyond her work with Global Labs, Ms. Ivanov has spearheaded numerous groundbreaking projects at Mars. One notable example is their collaboration with Sunstone Studios, where they are pioneering techniques for the world's first fully AI TV series. This ambitious project showcases her ability to lead cross-functional teams and deliver high-quality, innovative content.

Ms. Ivanov's contributions extend to the realm of advertising as well. Mars has produced brand-precise advertisements and videos for major clients such as BIC, Vita Coco, and Sweet Tarts, achieving exceptional results with small, efficient teams. Her leadership and technical prowess have enabled Mars to create compelling content that resonates with audiences and meets the highest standards of quality.

In addition to her technical and creative achievements, Ms. Ivanov has demonstrated remarkable business acumen. She has secured over $50 million in letters of intent from major brands and raised significant funding from top venture capital firms, including Sequoia Capital. Her ability to build and manage cross-functional teams, develop strategic partnerships, and drive business growth is a testament to her extraordinary capabilities as a leader and entrepreneur.

Ms. Ivanov's work with Global Labs and her leadership at Mars have positioned her as a true pioneer in AI-driven creative content production. Her ability to integrate cutting-edge technology with artistic vision, coupled with her business acumen and leadership skills, make her an invaluable asset to the field. Her contributions are not only advancing the capabilities of AI in entertainment but also setting new standards for innovation and excellence.

In conclusion, Ms. Lana Ivanov is an individual of extraordinary ability whose contributions to AI-driven creative content production and technology integration are transforming the entertainment industry. Her groundbreaking work with Global Labs and her leadership at Mars demonstrate her unparalleled expertise, vision, and impact. Ms. Ivanov's ability to seamlessly blend technical innovation with artistic creativity, coupled with her remarkable business acumen, make her an invaluable asset to the field of AI. Her pioneering efforts are not only advancing the capabilities of AI in entertainment but also setting new standards for innovation and excellence. I wholeheartedly recommend Ms. Ivanov as an individual of extraordinary ability, and I am confident that she will continue to make significant contributions to the field.

If you have any questions, please feel free to contact me.

Sincerely,

Anna Johnson

Co-founder and CEO, Global Labs

Redwood Professor of Computer Science, Redwood University

Bentley Family Co-Director, Redwood Human-Centered AI Institute (HAI)

[email contact here]
final:
Dear Officer:

I am writing this letter to provide my strongest recommendation of Ms. Lana Ivanov as an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of artificial intelligence (AI) and creative content production. Ms. Ivanov is a true pioneer in AI-driven creative content production and technology integration, whose groundbreaking work in AI filmmaking is transforming the entertainment industry.

As background, I am the Redwood Professor of Computer Science at Redwood University and the Bentley Family Co-Director of the Redwood Human-Centered AI Institute (HAI). My research areas include machine learning, deep learning, computer vision, and AI in healthcare. I have published over 180 scientific articles and hold several patents in the field of AI.

In addition to my academic roles, I am the Co-founder and CEO of Global Labs, a spatial intelligence company developing Large Universe Models (LUMs) to understand and interact with the 3D world. Global Labs has raised $230 million in funding from investors such as Old Enterprise Associates, Sequoia Capital, and Fossil Ventures. Our technology is at the forefront of AI innovation, and we are working closely with industry leaders to integrate it into cutting-edge applications.

I am also the Co-Founder and Chairperson of the Board of AI4FUTURE, a nonprofit organization dedicated to educating a diverse group of future AI technologists and leaders. AI4FUTURE runs summer programs and online courses for high school students, focusing on AI fundamentals and ethical considerations. Our mission is to increase diversity and inclusion in the AI field, and we have reached over 15,000 students since our founding in 2017.

Through my roles at Redwood, Global Labs, and AI4FUTURE, I have had the opportunity to work with some of the brightest minds in AI research and development. I have seen firsthand the transformative potential of AI technologies across various domains, from healthcare to entertainment. It is in this context that I have come to know and appreciate Ms. Ivanov and her remarkable work in AI-driven creative content production.

I have had the pleasure of working closely with Ms. Ivanov and her team at Mars, an AI-native entertainment studio and tech lab that she co-founded and currently leads as CEO. Mars is at the forefront of pioneering storytelling in the age of AI, and Ms. Ivanov's vision and leadership have been instrumental in the company's success.

Under her guidance, Mars has developed a proprietary AI production process that integrates cutting-edge technologies, including Global Labs' spatial intelligence solutions. Her innovative methods established unprecedented ways of creating narrative films entirely through AI, personally crafting and refining techniques in concept development, visual treatment, and AI-driven sound design. Our collaboration has focused on leveraging Global Labs' Large Universe Models (LUMs) to achieve scene and lighting consistency in AI-generated content. This integration has brought a new level of predictability and scalability to AI filmmaking, moving it beyond randomness and into a realm of structured creativity.

Ms. Ivanov's profound technical expertise and creative insight have been central to this advancement at Mars. She has driven the development of novel methods for character and scene consistency by fine-tuning image diffusion models and combining 3D with AI imagery, continuously pushing the boundaries of AI-driven content production. Her dedication to developing such innovative approaches demonstrates her commitment to exploring the frontiers of AI capabilities and making advancements in this field. Her outstanding ability to merge technical innovation with artistic vision distinguishes Mars as a leader in the industry.

Building upon her technical and creative innovations, Ms. Ivanov's leadership at Mars has been instrumental in the company's emergence as a groundbreaking force in AI-native entertainment. As the founder of this pioneering AI entertainment agency, she has successfully secured over $50 million in letters of intent from major brands, celebrities, and film studios. This achievement underscores her ability to forge strategic partnerships and drive significant business growth. Her skillful navigation of the financial landscape is further evidenced by raising $1.8 million in capital from leading investors like Pine Capital and Sequoia Capital, highlighting her strong business acumen and visionary approach.

In addition to her strategic prowess, Ms. Ivanov has played a crucial role in assembling a global team of top talent in the industry. By personally interviewing and recruiting some of the finest AI creatives, she ensures that Mars remains at the forefront of transformative projects. Her ability to attract and nurture talent has been vital to the success and innovation seen at Mars.

Furthermore, Ms. Ivanov has excelled in producing and directing high-quality AI-generated advertisements for renowned brands such as BIC, Vita Coco, and Sweet Tarts. Her work consistently receives exceptionally positive feedback, with clients praising the unparalleled quality and creativity of her projects. By establishing relationships with prestigious investors and securing memberships in elite programs like the Pine Founders-in-Residence, she continues to position Mars as a leader in AI content production. This commitment enables Mars to secure clients across TV, music, and advertising, producing regular, high-end work that meets and exceeds client expectations.

Ms. Ivanov's work with Global Labs and her leadership at Mars have positioned her as a true pioneer in AI-driven creative content production. Her ability to integrate cutting-edge technology with artistic vision, coupled with her business acumen and leadership skills, make her an invaluable asset to the field. Her contributions are not only advancing the capabilities of AI in entertainment but also setting new standards for innovation and excellence.

In conclusion, Ms. Ivanov stands as an exemplary individual of extraordinary ability in the field of AI-driven creative content production. Her pioneering work with Mars has consistently pushed the boundaries of what is possible in the realm of AI in entertainment. Ms. Ivanov's unique fusion of cutting-edge technological integration, artistic vision, and strategic business acumen has not only transformed the industry but also established new benchmarks for innovation and excellence. Her efforts have not just advanced AI capabilities, but they have also inspired a new generation of creatives and technologists. I wholeheartedly recommend Ms. Ivanov as a leader and visionary whose future contributions will undoubtedly continue to shape the landscape of AI-driven storytelling. If you have any questions or need further insights, please feel free to contact me.

Sincerely,

Anna Johnson
Co-founder and CEO, Global Labs
Redwood Professor of Computer Science, Redwood University
Bentley Family Co-Director, Redwood Human-Centered AI Institute (HAI)
[insert contact information]
